sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85356" key="polu/steinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-στεινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85356.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πολυπόρευτος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl> (leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-στειβ-,</foreign> i.e. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-στῐβ-</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
